jobs.title: Entwicklungsingenieur*in Konstruktion 100%
jobs.description:
Entwicklungsingenieur*in Konstruktion 100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI).

## Entwicklungsingenieur*in Konstruktion 100%
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-3550 Langnau im Emmental

                                    Lingua:de
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Entwicklungsingenieur\*in Konstruktion Entwicklungsingenieur\*in Konstruktion Pensum: 100% Arbeitsort: Langnau i. E. Anstellungsart: Unbefristet Ihre Aufgaben Konzipieren und Auslegen von kompletten Modulen im Werkzeugmaschinenbau Selbstständiges Konstruieren in Siemens NX Begleiten und unterstützen der Montage in der Prototypenphase Proaktives Zusammenarbeiten im Entwicklungsteam Durchführen von Machbarkeitsstudien und Prüfen von Kundenpflichtenheften Sicherstellung von Qualität, Effizienz und Innovationsgrad in der Entwicklung Ihr Profil Entsprechende Ausbildung (FH oder höher) mit fundierter Erfahrung in der Entwicklung von Werkzeugmaschinen Ausgeprägtes technisches Know\-how in Mechanik, Konstruktion und Fertigung Mehrjährige CAD\-Erfahrung, vorzugsweise Siemens NX Logisches Denken, Kreativität, Teamfähigkeit und Belastbarkeit Sehr gute Deutsch\- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift ist einer der weltweit führenden Anbieter von 5\-Achs\-Fräslösungen für die Luft\- und Raumfahrt\- sowie die Energieerzeugungsindustrie. Mit einer starken Kundenorientierung liefert sowohl standardisierte als auch massgeschneiderte Lösungen, die auf spezifische Produktionsanforderungen zugeschnitten sind. Mehr erfahren... Wir bieten Ausgezeichnete Karrierechancen: UNITED MACHINING bietet viele Möglichkeiten zur Karriereentwicklung. Wir bieten einen Talentmanagementprozess (MyNextBigStep), um Ihre Karriere zu fördern. Ausgezeichnete Schulungsinstrumente: Bei UNITED MACHINING bieten wir Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten für alle. Wir bieten globale Lerntools sowie Schulungen und spezialisierte Kurse. Fokus auf Nachhaltigkeit und Innovation: Wir haben hohe Nachhaltigkeits\- und Innovationsziele. Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam auf eine nachhaltige Zukunft hinarbeiten. Über United Machining UNITED MACHINING ist einer der weltweit führenden Anbieter von Komplettlösungen für Hersteller von Präzisionskomponenten und Werkzeugen sowie für den Formenbau. Das Portfolio umfasst Maschinen für das Fräsen, die Funkenerosion, die Laserstrukturierung, die Lasermikrobearbeitung und die additive Fertigung. Darüber hinaus bietet der Geschäftsbereich Spindeln, Automatisierungslösungen, Werkzeuge und digitalisierte Lösungen, die durch einen unübertroffenen Kundenservice und Support unterstützt werden. Zu UNITED MACHINING gehören die Marken AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC und SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING hat seinen Hauptsitz in Biel, Schweiz, und beschäftigt derzeit über 3'000 Mitarbeitende an mehr als 50 Standorten weltweit. Mehr erfahren... Ihre Kontaktperson Imsand Talent Acquisition Manager \+41 32 366 11 11 Web E\-Mail GF Machining Solutions AG, Engineering Kanalweg 4 3550 Langnau i. E. Schweiz Jetzt bewerben jid29235cajm jit0519jm jiy26jm

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

                                    Teamleiter\*in Einkauf Teamleiter\*in Einkauf Pensum: 100% Arbeitsort: Langnau i. E. Anstellungsart: Unbefristet Ihre Aufgaben Fachliche, organisatorische und disziplinarische Führung des Einkaufsteams (5 MA) in strategischen und operativen Bereichen Weiterentwicklung, Optimierung und Standardisierung der Einkaufsprozesse sowie aktive Mitgestaltung der konzerninternen Einkaufsstrategie Erarbeitung und Überprüfung der Einkaufs\- und Lieferstrategie in Abstimmung mit der Konzernstrategie, inklusive Erschliessung neuer globaler Beschaffungsquellen Aktives Lieferantenmanagement mit Verhandlungsführung, Vertragsabschlüssen, Lieferantenbewertung und \-entwicklung gemäss QS Sicherstellung der Beschaffung (Forecast\-Planung, Materialverfügbarkeit für Kundenprojekte), Betreuung von Projekten (Neuentwicklungen/Redesign) sowie Erstellung von Reportings Ihr Profil Eidg. Dipl. Einkäufer\*in mit technischem Flair oder Ausbildung im Supply Chain Management; betriebswirtschaftliche Weiterbildung von Vorteil Mehrjährige Berufserfahrung in vergleichbarer Führungsfunktion im Einkauf Ausgeprägte Organisationsfähigkeit, systematische Denkweise sowie Entscheidungs\- und Durchsetzungsstärke Teamfähige und kommunikationsstarke Persönlichkeit mit selbstständiger, belastbarer und lösungsorientierter Arbeitsweise Sehr gute Deutsch\- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift sowie sehr gute SAP\- und MS\-Office\-Kenntnisse ist einer der weltweit führenden Anbieter von 5\-Achs\-Fräslösungen für die Luft\- und Raumfahrt\- sowie die Energieerzeugungsindustrie. Fokus auf Nachhaltigkeit und Innovation: Wir haben hohe Nachhaltigkeits\- und Innovationsziele. Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam auf eine nachhaltige Zukunft hinarbeiten. Über United Machining UNITED MACHINING ist einer der weltweit führenden Anbieter von Komplettlösungen für Hersteller von Präzisionskomponenten und Werkzeugen sowie für den Formenbau. Das Portfolio umfasst Maschinen für das Fräsen, die Funkenerosion, die Laserstrukturierung, die Lasermikrobearbeitung und die additive Fertigung. Darüber hinaus bietet der Geschäftsbereich Spindeln, Automatisierungslösungen, Werkzeuge und digitalisierte Lösungen, die durch einen unübertroffenen Kundenservice und Support unterstützt werden. Das Portfolio umfasst Maschinen für das Fräsen, die Funkenerosion, die Laserstrukturierung, die Lasermikrobearbeitung und die additive Fertigung. Darüber hinaus bietet der Geschäftsbereich Spindeln, Automatisierungslösungen, Werkzeuge und digitalisierte Lösungen, die durch einen unübertroffenen Kundenservice und Support unterstützt werden. titleByLocale.fr: Ingénieur en développement* dans la construction

descriptionByLocale.it: Ingegnere dello sviluppo*in costruzione — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). Ingegnere di sviluppo* in Costruzione AGIE Charmilles SAIE, 3550 Langnau nell'Emmental None Employee (Svizzera) Nessuno Dipendenti (globale) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 100% 3550 Langnau in Emmental Lingua:de Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Development Engineer*in Development Engineer Con un forte orientamento al cliente, sono disponibili soluzioni standardizzate e su misura che sono adattate a specifiche esigenze di produzione. Ulteriori informazioni... Offriamo eccellenti opportunità di carriera: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità per lo sviluppo di carriera. Offriamo un processo di gestione del talento (MyNextBigStep) per promuovere la tua carriera. Strumenti di formazione eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING offriamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo strumenti di apprendimento globali e corsi di formazione e di specializzazione. Focus sulla sostenibilità e l'innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Lavoriamo insieme su un futuro sostenibile. UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per i produttori di componenti e utensili di precisione e per la costruzione di stampi. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, erosione scintilla, strutturazione laser, micromachining laser e produzione additiva. Inoltre, i mandrini, le soluzioni di automazione, gli strumenti e la divisione di soluzioni digitalizzate, supportati da un servizio clienti e supporto senza pari. UNITED MACHINING comprende i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING ha sede a Biel, in Svizzera, e attualmente impiega oltre 3.000 persone in oltre 50 sedi in tutto il mondo. Ulteriori informazioni... Il tuo contatto Imsand Talent Acquisition Manager +41 32 366 11 Web E-Mail GF Machining Solutions AG, Engineering Kanalweg 4 3550 Langnau i. E. Svizzera

Your tasks
Design and deploy complete modules in machine tool construction
Self-constituting in Siemens NX
Accompanying and supporting assembly in the prototype phase
Proactive cooperation in the development team
Implementation of feasibility studies and testing of customer requirements
Ensuring quality, efficiency and innovation in development
Your profile
Appropriate training (FH or higher) with profound experience in the development of machine tools
Embossed technical know-how in mechanics, construction and manufacturing
Multiannual CAD experience, preferably Siemens NX
Logical thinking, creativity, team skills and resilience
Very good knowledge of German and English in word and writing
is one of the world's leading providers of 5-axis milling solutions for aerospace and
Energy production industry. With a strong customer orientation, both standardized and
tailor-made solutions tailored to specific production requirements.

                                    Projektleiter*in Kundenprojekte

Pensum: 100%

Arbeitsort: Biel

Anstellungsart: Unbefristet

Ihre Aufgaben

- Leitung und Koordination interdisziplinärer Teams zur Entwicklung der nächsten Fräsmaschinen-Generation.
- Gesamtverantwortung für den Projekterfolg hinsichtlich Time to Market, Kosten, Spezifikationen und Qualität.
- Integration der Kundenperspektive in alle Projektphasen zur Sicherstellung einer marktnahen Produktentwicklung im 
Zusammenhang mit Produktmanagement.
- Verantwortung für zentrale Projektschritte inkl. Make-or-Buy-Entscheidungen und Lieferantenauswahl in Abstimmung mit 
dem Einkauf.
- Sicherstellung einer effizienten Industrialisierung und eines erfolgreichen Produktionsstarts.
- Verantwortlich für die Entwicklung von Prototypen sowie die Organisation und Durchführung von Tests bei Pilotkunden.

Ihr Profil

Homepage

Project manager*in customer projects

Pensum: 100%

Place of work: Biel

Type of employment: Unlimited

Your tasks

- Management and coordination of interdisciplinary teams to develop the next milling machine generation.
- Total responsibility for project success in terms of time to market, costs, specifications and quality.
- Integrating customer perspective into all project phases to ensure market-oriented product development
Link to product management.
- Responsibility for central project steps incl. Make-or-Buy decisions and supplier selection in coordination with
shopping.
- Ensuring efficient industrialization and a successful production start.
- Responsible for the development of prototypes as well as the organisation and execution of tests on pilot customers.

Your profile

- Complete studies in mechanical engineering, mechatronics or a comparable subject.
- Multiannual experience in project management and the development of innovative mechanical engineering projects
preferably machine tools.
- Representative leadership competencies with experience in leading interdisciplinary teams and the ability to
motivate and inspire employees.
- Solution-oriented thinking and organizational talent, entrepreneurial thinking and result-oriented.
- Embossed customer orientation and ability to cross-function cooperation with internal and external
Stakeholder.

MIKRON MILL is one of the world's experts for vertical milling and high-speed milling. The
automatable machines are known for dynamic precision and free-form accuracy and deliver
Top performance in complex applications. MIKRON MILL stands for innovation, agility and sustainable added value.

Learn more...

We offer

Excellent career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING offers many opportunities for career development. We offer
Talent Management Process (MyNextBigStep) to promote your career.

Excellent training tools: At UNITED MACHINING we offer development opportunities for all. We offer
Global learning tools as well as training and specialized courses.

Focus on sustainability and innovation: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let us
work together on a sustainable future.

About United Machining

UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading suppliers of complete solutions for manufacturers of
Precision components and tools as well as for mold construction. The portfolio includes machines for milling,
spark erosion, laser structuring, laser micromachining and additive manufacturing. In addition,
Spindles, automation solutions, tools and digitized solutions, through
support unmatched customer service and support.
UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently employs more than 3,000 employees
50 locations worldwide.

Learn more...

Your contact person

Luca Imsand

Talent Acquisition Manager

Roger-Federerer Avenue 7
2504 Biel
Switzerland

Pensum: 100%

Arbeitsort: Biel

Anstellungsart: Unbefristet

Ihre Aufgaben

- Sie sind die zentrale technische Ansprechperson für unsere Verkaufsgesellschaften und unterstützen diese im Second 
Level Support bei komplexen technischen Fragestellungen.
- Sie nehmen Beanstandungen unserer Servicetechniker entgegen, bereiten diese strukturiert auf und koordinieren die 
Servicefälle über Telefon, E-Mail und das Ticketing-System.
- Sie erarbeiten nachhaltige technische Lösungen, kommunizieren diese lösungsorientiert an den First Level Support und 
stellen eine hohe Servicequalität sicher.
- Sie sammeln, analysieren und bewerten wiederkehrende Problemfälle, identifizieren systematische Fehler und treiben 
aktiv die kontinuierliche Qualitätsverbesserung voran.
- Sie agieren als Schnittstelle zum Third Level Support (Hersteller), betreuen Windows-basierte Maschinensteuerungen 
und erstellen Servicedokumentationen sowie Unterlagen für Koordinationsmeetings.

Ihr Profil

- Sie verfügen über eine abgeschlossene technische Grundausbildung und verbinden technisches Verständnis mit einer 
ausgeprägten Affinität zu kaufmännischen und organisatorischen Themen.
- Sie bringen mindestens zwei Jahre Erfahrung in einer vergleichbaren Funktion im Maschinenbau mit.
- Begriffe wie Fräsen, Elektrotechnik, Hydraulik, Pneumatik und PLC-Programmierung sind für Sie Teil Ihres beruflichen 
Alltags und wecken Ihr technisches Interesse.
- Sie arbeiten sicher mit Windows-basierten Systemen und bringen solide Informatikkenntnisse für den Umgang mit 
Maschinensteuerungen und Ticketing-Tools mit.
- Sie kommunizieren klar und lösungsorientiert und verfügen über sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse sowie gute Kenntnisse in 
Französisch und Englisch in Wort und Schrift.
- Sie sind bereit zur Reisetätigkeit im Rahmen von rund 20%.

MIKRON MILL ist einer der weltweiten Experten für vertikales Fräsen und Erfinder des Hochgeschwindigkeitsfräsens. Die 
automatisierungsfähigen Maschinen sind bekannt für dynamische Präzision und Freiformgenauigkeit und liefern 
Spitzenleistungen bei komplexen Anwendungen. MIKRON MILL steht für Innovation, Agilität und nachhaltigen Mehrwert.

Mehr erfahren...

Ausgezeichnete Karrierechancen: UNITED MACHINING bietet viele Möglichkeiten zur Karriereentwicklung. Wir bieten einen 
Talentmanagementprozess (MyNextBigStep), um Ihre Karriere zu fördern.

Ausgezeichnete Schulungsinstrumente: Bei UNITED MACHINING bieten wir Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten für alle. Wir bieten 
globale Lerntools sowie Schulungen und spezialisierte Kurse.

Fokus auf Nachhaltigkeit und Innovation: Wir haben hohe Nachhaltigkeits- und Innovationsziele. Lassen Sie uns 
gemeinsam auf eine nachhaltige Zukunft hinarbeiten.

Über uns

UNITED MACHINING ist einer der weltweit führenden Anbieter von Komplettlösungen für Hersteller von 
Präzisionskomponenten und Werkzeugen sowie für den Formenbau. Das Portfolio umfasst Maschinen für das Fräsen, die 
Funkenerosion, die Laserstrukturierung, die Lasermikrobearbeitung und die additive Fertigung. Darüber hinaus bietet der 
Geschäftsbereich Spindeln, Automatisierungslösungen, Werkzeuge und digitalisierte Lösungen, die durch einen 
unübertroffenen Kundenservice und Support unterstützt werden.

Zu UNITED MACHINING gehören die Marken AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC und SYSTEM 3R.

UNITED MACHINING hat seinen Hauptsitz in Biel, Schweiz, und beschäftigt derzeit über 3'000 Mitarbeitende an mehr als

Tipo di lavoro: illimitato

I tuoi compiti

- Sono il contatto tecnico centrale per le nostre aziende di vendita e li sostengono nel secondo
Supporto a livello per domande tecniche complesse.
- Ricevono reclami dai nostri tecnici del servizio, li preparano strutturalmente e coordinano
Casi di servizio tramite telefono, e-mail e sistema di ticketing.
- Sviluppano soluzioni tecniche sostenibili, comunicano queste soluzioni al supporto di First Level e
garantire alta qualità di servizio.
- Raccogli, analizza e valuta problemi ricorrenti, identifica errori sistematici e unità
promuovere attivamente il miglioramento continuo della qualità.
- Agisci come interfaccia per il supporto di terzo livello (produttore), mantieni i controlli delle macchine basati su Windows
e creare documentazione di servizio e documentazione per riunioni di coordinamento.

Il tuo profilo

- Hanno completato la formazione tecnica di base e combinano la comprensione tecnica con una
forte affinità per questioni commerciali e organizzative.
- Portano almeno due anni di esperienza in una funzione paragonabile nell'ingegneria meccanica.
- Termini come fresatura, ingegneria elettrica, idraulica, pneumatica e programmazione PLC fanno parte del vostro professionista
Ogni giorno la vita e risvegliare il vostro interesse tecnico.
- Lavorano in modo sicuro con i sistemi basati su Windows e forniscono una solida conoscenza dell'informatica per la gestione
Comandi della macchina e strumenti di biglietteria.
- Comunicano chiaramente e orientati alla soluzione e hanno una buona conoscenza del tedesco e della buona conoscenza in
Francese e inglese in parola e scrittura.
- Sono pronti a viaggiare entro il 20%.

MIKRON MILL è uno degli esperti mondiali per fresatura verticale e fresatura ad alta velocità. The
macchine automatiche sono note per precisione dinamica e precisione della forma libera e fornire
Le migliori prestazioni in applicazioni complesse. MIKRON MILL è sinonimo di innovazione, agilità e valore aggiunto sostenibile.

Per saperne di più...

Offriamo

Opportunità di carriera eccellenti: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità per lo sviluppo della carriera. Offriamo
Talent Management Process (MyNextBigStep) per promuovere la tua carriera.

Strumenti di formazione eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING offriamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo
Strumenti di apprendimento globali, corsi di formazione e corsi specializzati.

Focus sulla sostenibilità e l'innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Andiamo.
lavorare insieme su un futuro sostenibile.

Informazioni su di noi

UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per i produttori di
Componenti e strumenti di precisione e per la costruzione di stampi. Il portafoglio comprende macchine per fresatura,
erosione scintilla, strutturazione laser, micromachining laser e produzione additiva. Inoltre,
Spindles, soluzioni di automazione, strumenti e soluzioni digitalizzate, attraverso
supporto ineguagliabile servizio clienti e supporto.

UNITED MACHINING comprende i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R.

UNITED MACHINING ha sede a Biel, in Svizzera, e attualmente impiega oltre 3.000 dipendenti
50 sedi in tutto il mondo.

Projektleiter (m/d)

Pensum: 100%

Place of work: Biel

Type of employment: Unlimited

Your tasks

- They are the central technical contact for our sales companies and support them in the second
Level support for complex technical questions.
- They receive complaints from our service technicians, prepare them structuredly and coordinate the
Service cases via phone, email and ticketing system.
- They develop sustainable technical solutions, communicate these solutions to First Level support and
ensure high service quality.
- You collect, analyze and evaluate recurring problems, identify systematic errors and drive
actively promote continuous quality improvement.
- You act as an interface to Third Level Support (manufacturer), maintain Windows-based machine controls
and create service documentation as well as documentation for coordination meetings.

Your profile

- They have completed basic technical training and combine technical understanding with a
strong affinity for commercial and organizational issues.
- They bring at least two years of experience in a comparable function in mechanical engineering.
- Terms such as milling, electrical engineering, hydraulics, pneumatics and PLC programming are part of your professional
Everyday life and awaken your technical interest.
- They work safely with Windows-based systems and provide solid knowledge of computer science for handling
Machine controls and ticketing tools.
- They communicate clearly and solution-oriented and have very good knowledge of German and good knowledge in
French and English in word and writing.
- They are ready to travel within around 20%.

MIKRON MILL is one of the world's experts for vertical milling and high-speed milling. The
automatable machines are known for dynamic precision and free-form accuracy and deliver
Top performance in complex applications. MIKRON MILL stands for innovation, agility and sustainable added value.

Learn more...

We offer

Excellent career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING offers many opportunities for career development. We offer
Talent Management Process (MyNextBigStep) to promote your career.

Excellent training tools: At UNITED MACHINING we offer development opportunities for all. We offer
Global learning tools as well as training and specialized courses.

Focus on sustainability and innovation: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let us
work together on a sustainable future.

About us

UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading suppliers of complete solutions for manufacturers of
Precision components and tools as well as for mold construction. The portfolio includes machines for milling,
spark erosion, laser structuring, laser micromachining and additive manufacturing. In addition,
Spindles, automation solutions, tools and digitized solutions, through
support unmatched customer service and support.

UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.

UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently employs more than 3,000 employees
50 locations worldwide.

Learn more...

2504 Biel
Switzerland

Anstellungsart: Unbefristet
Ihre Aufgaben
Sie sind die zentrale technische Ansprechperson für unsere Verkaufsgesellschaften und unterstützen diese im Second 
Level Support bei komplexen technischen Fragestellungen.
Sie nehmen Beanstandungen unserer Servicetechniker entgegen, bereiten diese strukturiert auf und koordinieren die 
Servicefälle über Telefon, E-Mail und das Ticketing-System.
Sie erarbeiten nachhaltige technische Lösungen, kommunizieren diese lösungsorientiert an den First Level Support und 
stellen eine hohe Servicequalität sicher.
Sie sammeln, analysieren und bewerten wiederkehrende Problemfälle, identifizieren systematische Fehler und treiben 
aktiv die kontinuierliche Qualitätsverbesserung voran.
Sie agieren als Schnittstelle zum Third Level Support (Hersteller), betreuen Windows-basierte Maschinensteuerungen und 
erstellen Servicedokumentationen sowie Unterlagen für Koordinationsmeetings.
Ihr Profil
Sie verfügen über eine abgeschlossene technische Grundausbildung und verbinden technisches Verständnis mit einer 
ausgeprägten Affinität zu kaufmännischen und organisatorischen Themen.
Sie bringen mindestens zwei Jahre Erfahrung in einer vergleichbaren Funktion im Maschinenbau mit.
Begriffe wie Fräsen, Elektrotechnik, Hydraulik, Pneumatik und PLC-Programmierung sind für Sie Teil Ihres beruflichen 
Alltags und wecken Ihr technisches Interesse.
Sie arbeiten sicher mit Windows-basierten Systemen und bringen solide Informatikkenntnisse für den Umgang mit 
Maschinensteuerungen und Ticketing-Tools mit.
Sie kommunizieren klar und lösungsorientiert und verfügen über sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse sowie gute Kenntnisse in 
ösisch und Englisch in Wort und Schrift.
Sie sind bereit zur Reisetätigkeit im Rahmen von rund 20%.
MIKRON MILL ist einer der weltweiten Experten für vertikales Fräsen und Erfinder des Hochgeschwindigkeitsfräsens. Die 
automatisierungsfähigen Maschinen sind bekannt für dynamische Präzision und Freiformgenauigkeit und liefern 
Spitzenleistungen bei komplexen Anwendungen. MIKRON MILL steht für Innovation, Agilität und nachhaltigen Mehrwert.

globale Lerntools sowie Schulungen und spezialisierte Kurse.
Fokus auf Nachhaltigkeit und Innovation: Wir haben hohe Nachhaltigkeits- und Innovationsziele. Lassen Sie uns 
gemeinsam auf eine nachhaltige Zukunft hinarbeiten.
Über uns
UNITED MACHINING ist einer der weltweit führenden Anbieter von Komplettlösungen für Hersteller von 
Präzisionskomponenten und Werkzeugen sowie für den Formenbau. Das Portfolio umfasst Maschinen für das Fräsen, die 
Funkenerosion, die Laserstrukturierung, die Lasermikrobearbeitung und die additive Fertigung. Darüber hinaus bietet der 
Geschäftsbereich Spindeln, Automatisierungslösungen, Werkzeuge und digitalisierte Lösungen, die durch einen

Essi sono il principale contatto tecnico per le nostre aziende di vendita e li sostengono nel secondo
Supporto a livello per domande tecniche complesse.
Ricevono reclami dai nostri tecnici di servizio, li preparano strutturalmente e coordinano i

Sviluppano soluzioni tecniche sostenibili, comunicano queste soluzioni al supporto di First Level e
garantire alta qualità di servizio.
Essi raccolgono, analizzano e valutano problemi ricorrenti, identificano errori sistematici e unità
promuovere attivamente il miglioramento continuo della qualità.
Si agisce come interfaccia per il supporto di terzo livello (produttore), mantenere i controlli delle macchine basati su Windows e
creare documentazione di servizio e documentazione per riunioni di coordinamento.

forte affinità per questioni commerciali e organizzative.
Essi portano almeno due anni di esperienza in una funzione paragonabile in ingegneria meccanica.
Termini come fresatura, ingegneria elettrica, idraulica, pneumatica e programmazione PLC fanno parte del vostro professionista
Ogni giorno la vita e risvegliare il vostro interesse tecnico.

Essi comunicano chiaramente e orientati alla soluzione e hanno una conoscenza molto buona del tedesco e buona conoscenza in

macchine automatiche sono note per precisione dinamica e precisione della forma libera e fornire

Focus sulla sostenibilità e l'innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Andiamo.
lavorare insieme su un futuro sostenibile.

UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per i produttori di

Your tasks
They are the central technical contact for our sales companies and support them in the second
Level support for complex technical questions.
They receive complaints from our service technicians, prepare them structuredly and coordinate the
Service cases via phone, email and ticketing system.
They develop sustainable technical solutions, communicate these solutions to First Level support and
ensure high service quality.
They collect, analyze and evaluate recurring problems, identify systematic errors and drive
actively promote continuous quality improvement.
You act as an interface to Third Level Support (manufacturer), maintain Windows-based machine controls and
create service documentation and documentation for coordination meetings.
Your profile
They have completed basic technical training and combine technical understanding with a
strong affinity for commercial and organizational issues.
They bring at least two years of experience in a comparable function in mechanical engineering.
Terms such as milling, electrical engineering, hydraulics, pneumatics and PLC programming are part of your professional
Everyday life and awaken your technical interest.
They work safely with Windows-based systems and provide solid knowledge of computer science for handling
Machine controls and ticketing tools.
They communicate clearly and solution-oriented and have very good knowledge of German and good knowledge in
and English in word and writing.
They are ready to travel within around 20%.
MIKRON MILL is one of the world's experts for vertical milling and high-speed milling. The
automatable machines are known for dynamic precision and free-form accuracy and deliver
Top performance in complex applications. MIKRON MILL stands for innovation, agility and sustainable added value.
Learn more...
We offer
Excellent career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING offers many opportunities for career development. We offer
Talent Management Process (MyNextBigStep) to promote your career.
Excellent training tools: At UNITED MACHINING we offer development opportunities for all. We offer
Global learning tools as well as training and specialized courses.
Focus on sustainability and innovation: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let us
work together on a sustainable future.
About us
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading suppliers of complete solutions for manufacturers of
Precision components and tools as well as for mold construction. The portfolio includes machines for milling,
spark erosion, laser structuring, laser micromachining and additive manufacturing. In addition,
Spindles, automation solutions, tools and digitized solutions, through
support unmatched customer service and support.
UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently employs more than 3,000 employees
50 locations worldwide.

jobs.description:
Metrology Technician — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI).

## Metrology Technician
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, Losone

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                

                                
                                  
                                  
                                      

                                      
                                        None Angestellte (Schweiz) 

                                        None Angestellte (global)
                                      

                                  
                                  
                                

                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Temporaneo:
                                            
                                                No
                                            
                                        
                                        
                                            Carico di lavoro:
                                            100%
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                                    Losone
                                    
                                    Lingua:en
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Metrology Technician

Workload: 100%

Location: Losone

Job type: Unlimited

Your tasks

- Perform dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring 
accuracy, repeatability, and compliance with quality standards.
- Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments 
(Calypso, Quindos).
- Define, optimize, and standardize measurement programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO 
GPS standards.
- Analyze measurement results, support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R&D to 
ensure robust inspection processes.
- Manage and continuously improve inspection-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, 
contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup.

Your profile

- Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent background.
- At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD&T 
certification is a plus.
- Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement standards.
- Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills.
- Fluent in Italian; English B1.

AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.

Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.

Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.

Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.

UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.

worldwide.

Automatico EFZ (w/m/d) Automatico EFZ (w/m/d) Penso: 80\-100% Luogo di lavoro: Biel Posizione: Illimitato Sono utilizzati come professionisti nel campo del cablaggio e/o della messa in servizio delle nostre macchine di fresatura ad alta velocità 3\ e 5\-assi complessi. Per questo è disponibile un'infrastruttura moderna. Qui puoi sviluppare le tue competenze tecniche. Essi sono responsabili della tempestiva messa in servizio delle macchine CNC\ (Sinumerik o Heidenhain) e delle loro attrezzature periferiche in conformità con le linee guida di qualità. Inoltre, siete responsabili per la manutenzione di attrezzature e strutture nella vostra zona. Il tuo profilo Hai una formazione di base elettrica completa (EFZ), ideale per l'esperienza automatica, automatica, elettromeccanica, elettronica o elettrica con esperienza elettronica/informatica. L'esperienza nella costruzione di macchine e apparecchi è vantaggiosa. Il pensiero orientato alla soluzione, il fascino tecnico e le abilità diagnostiche pronunciate sono tra i loro punti di forza. Hanno ottime competenze tedesche, l'inglese è vantaggioso. Una consapevolezza di alta qualità ti distingue e sei abituato a lavorare in modo indipendente e preciso. Ti rende felice di assumerti la responsabilità e vuoi evolverti costantemente. Nel nostro gruppo internazionale troverete interessanti opportunità di sviluppo. MIKRON MILL è uno degli esperti mondiali per fresatura verticale e fresatura ad alta velocità. Le macchine di automazione-capable sono note per la precisione dinamica e la precisione della forma libera e offrono l'eccellenza in applicazioni complesse. MIKRON MILL è sinonimo di innovazione, agilità e valore aggiunto sostenibile. Ulteriori informazioni... Offriamo eccellenti opportunità di carriera: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità per lo sviluppo di carriera. Offriamo un processo di gestione del talento (MyNextBigStep) per promuovere la tua carriera. Strumenti di formazione eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING offriamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo strumenti di apprendimento globali e corsi di formazione e di specializzazione. Focus sulla sostenibilità e l'innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Lavoriamo insieme su un futuro sostenibile. UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per i produttori di componenti e utensili di precisione e per la costruzione di stampi. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, erosione scintilla, strutturazione laser, micromachining laser e produzione additiva. Inoltre, i mandrini, le soluzioni di automazione, gli strumenti e la divisione di soluzioni digitalizzate, supportati da un servizio clienti e supporto senza pari. UNITED MACHINING comprende i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING ha sede a Biel, in Svizzera, e attualmente impiega oltre 3.000 persone in oltre 50 sedi in tutto il mondo. Ulteriori informazioni... Automatic EFZ (w/m/d) Automatic EFZ (w/m/d) Pensum: 80\-100% Place of employment: Biel Position: Unlimited They are used as a professional in the field of wiring and/or commissioning of our complex 3\ and 5\-axis high-speed milling machines. A modern infrastructure is available for this. Here you can develop your technical skills. They are responsible for the timely commissioning of CNC\ machines (Sinumerik or Heidenhain) and their peripheral equipment in compliance with quality guidelines. In addition, you are responsible for the maintenance of equipment and facilities in your area. Your profile You have a completed electrical basic formation (EFZ), ideally for automatic, automatic, electromechanical, electronic or electrician with electronic/informatic experience. Experience in machine and apparatus construction is advantageous. Solution-oriented thinking, technical flair and pronounced diagnostic skills are among their strengths. They have very good German skills, English is advantageous. A high quality awareness distinguishes you and you are used to work independently and accurately. It makes you happy to take responsibility and you want to constantly evolve. In our international group you will find exciting opportunities for development. MIKRON MILL is one of the world's experts for vertical milling and high-speed milling. The automation-capable machines are known for dynamic precision and free-form accuracy and deliver excellence in complex applications. MIKRON MILL stands for innovation, agility and sustainable added value. Learn more... We offer excellent career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING offers many opportunities for career development. We offer a talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to promote your career. Excellent training tools: At UNITED MACHINING we offer development opportunities for all. We offer global learning tools as well as training and specialized courses. Focus on sustainability and innovation: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let us work together on a sustainable future. About us UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading suppliers of complete solutions for manufacturers of precision components and tools as well as for mould construction. The portfolio includes milling, spark erosion, laser structuring, laser micromachining and additive manufacturing. In addition, the spindles, automation solutions, tools and digitized solutions division, which are supported by unmatched customer service and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently employs over 3,000 people at more than 50 locations worldwide. Learn more... Your contact person Personnel Specialst \+41 32 366 11 11 Web United Machining Mill AG \-Federerer\-Allee 7 2504 Biel Schweiz Direct applications are preferred. unseren Kunden

- Durchführung von Wartungsarbeiten

- Mechanische oder elektrische Grundausbildung ( in Automatik, Polymechanik)

UNITED MACHINING ist einer der weltweit führenden Anbieter von Komplettlösungen für Hersteller von

our customers

- With the help of machine reassembly

Your profile

- Mechanical or electrical basic construction (in automatic, polymechanics)
- Mechanical, electrical, hydraulic and pneumatic characteristics
- Ideally customer service experience in service technology or assembly
- knowledge of CNC controls of advantage (Siemens or Heidenhain)
- German and English ( oral and written)
- Readiness to travel worldwide up to about 80%

LIECHTI is one of the world's leading providers of 5-axis milling solutions for aerospace and
Energy production industry. With a strong customer orientation, LIECHTI delivers both standardized and
tailor-made solutions tailored to specific production requirements.

Learn more...

We offer

Excellent career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING offers many opportunities for career development. We offer
Talent Management Process (MyNextBigStep) to promote your career.

Excellent training tools: At UNITED MACHINING we offer development opportunities for all. We offer
Global learning tools as well as training and specialized courses.

Focus on sustainability and innovation: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let us
work together on a sustainable future.

About United Machining

UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading suppliers of complete solutions for manufacturers of
Precision components and tools as well as for mold construction. The portfolio includes machines for milling,
spark erosion, laser structuring, laser micromachining and additive manufacturing. In addition,
Spindles, automation solutions, tools and digitized solutions, through
support unmatched customer service and support.
UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently employs more than 3,000 employees
50 locations worldwide.

                                    Software Engineer Expert - R&D
Software Engineer Expert – R&D
Workload: 100%
Location: Losone
Job type: Unlimited
Your tasks
Develop and maintain HMI software aligned with EDM machine requirements and user experience standards.
Comfortable handling complex mathematical and algorithmic challenges, particularly in analytical 3D geometry — a core 
requirement for geometric processing in EDM software.
Interface with Real-Time & PLC teams to define, validate, and improve new functionalities.
Ensure software quality through testing, documentation, and structured code reviews.
Participate in technical workshops, cross-team validations, and support knowledge-sharing across engineering teams.
Your profile
Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent technical field.
Proven experience in industrial software environments, at least 3 years.
Strong background in Object-Oriented architecture, UML, and OO programming (C# / .NET); experience in HMI development 
(WPF / XAML).
Good understanding of the full software development lifecycle, quality assurance, and Agile / Scrum methodologies.
Structured, autonomous, and collaborative working style; customer-oriented and resilient under pressure.
Fluent in English and Italian.
AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.
Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.
Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.
Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.
UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites 
worldwide.
Your contact

6616 Losone
Schweiz

descriptionByLocale.it: Software Engineer Expert - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Software Engineer Expert - R&D AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, 6616 Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) Nessuno Angestellte (globale) Temporaneo: No. Carico di lavoro: 100% 6616 Losone Lingua: Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Software Engineer Expert - R&D Software Engineer Expert – R&D Carico di lavoro: 100% Posizione: Losone Tipo di lavoro: illimitato I tuoi compiti Sviluppare e mantenere il software HMI allineato con i requisiti della macchina EDM e gli standard di esperienza dell'utente. Confortevoli sfide matematiche e algoritmiche, in particolare nella geometria 3D analitica — un nucleo requisito per la lavorazione geometrica nel software EDM. Interfaccia con i team Real-Time & PLC per definire, convalidare e migliorare nuove funzionalità. Assicurare la qualità del software attraverso test, documentazione e recensioni di codice strutturate. Partecipare a workshop tecnici, validazioni trasversali e sostenere la condivisione delle conoscenze tra i team di ingegneria. Il tuo profilo Laurea magistrale in Ingegneria Informatica, Informatica, o campo tecnico equivalente. Esperienza dimostrata in ambienti software industriali, almeno 3 anni. Forte sfondo nell'architettura orientata agli oggetti, nella programmazione UML e OO (C# / .NET); esperienza nello sviluppo HMI (WPF / XAML). Buona comprensione del ciclo di vita di sviluppo del software completo, garanzia di qualità e metodologie Agile / Scrum. Stile di lavoro strutturato, autonomo e collaborativo; orientato al cliente e resiliente sotto pressione. Fluente in inglese e italiano. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventore di EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), è noto come marchio premium e leader dell'innovazione in filo, die-sinking, e foro-drilling EDM. Le sue soluzioni di automazione sono utilizzate nella fabbricazione di stampi e nella produzione di componenti di fascia alta, offrendo precisione, affidabilità e prestazioni svizzere. Grandi opportunità di carriera: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità per quanto riguarda la crescita della carriera. Offriamo anche un dedicato processo di gestione del talento (MyNextBigStep) per aumentare la vostra carriera. Strumenti di apprendimento eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING forniamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo globale strumenti di apprendimento, nonché formazione e corsi specializzati. Sostenibilità e innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Lavoriamo verso un futuro sostenibile insieme. UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per componenti e strumenti di precisione produttori e l'industria dello stampaggio. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, EDM, texturing laser, micromachining laser, e macchine di produzione additive. Inoltre, la divisione offre mandrini, automazione, utensili e digitalizzazione soluzioni supportate da servizi e supporto clienti senza rivali. UNITED MACHINING comprende i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING ha sede a Biel, in Svizzera, e attualmente conta oltre 3'000 dipendenti su oltre 50 siti in tutto il mondo. Electronic Engineer – R&D
Workload: 100%
Location: Losone
Job type: Unlimited
Your tasks
Design, develop, test, and maintain power, analog, and digital electronics for current and next-generation generator 
hardware platforms for EDM (electro discharge) machines.
Acquire and develop process control know-how on EDM machines, including troubleshooting and process analysis, 
contributing to customer/field case resolution and working closely with application development teams.
Support component homologation, database management, and purchasing activities for new and second-source components.
Collaborate with Production teams on test system development and pre-series activities.
Contribute to compliance with relevant standards throughout the hardware development lifecycle.
Your profile
Master's degree in Electronic Engineering.
Proven experience, at least 2 years, in analog, power, and digital electronics design; knowledge of VHDL and 
electronic simulation tools.
Familiarity with measurement equipment (multimeters, oscilloscopes) and programming languages (C, C++, C#, ).
Knowledge of Matlab/Simulink; FMEA and quality processes are a plus.
Methodical and rigorous approach, strong team orientation, and genuine drive for continuous improvement.
Fluent in Italian; technical English (oral and written) is required.
AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.

descriptionByLocale.it: Electronic Engineer - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Electronic Engineer - R&D AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, 6616 Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) Nessuno Angestellte (globale) Temporaneo: No. Carico di lavoro: 100% 6616 Losone Lingua: Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Electronic Engineer - R&D Electronic Engineer – R&D Carico di lavoro: 100% Posizione: Losone Tipo di lavoro: illimitato I tuoi compiti Progettazione, sviluppo, test e mantenere la potenza, l'elettronica analogica e digitale per il generatore di corrente e di prossima generazione piattaforme hardware per macchine EDM (electro dump). Acquisire e sviluppare il know-how di controllo del processo sulle macchine EDM, tra cui la risoluzione dei problemi e l'analisi del processo, contribuire alla risoluzione dei casi del cliente/campo e lavorare a stretto contatto con i team di sviluppo delle applicazioni. Supporta l'omologazione dei componenti, la gestione dei database e le attività di acquisto per componenti nuovi e di seconda risorsa. Collabora con i team di produzione per lo sviluppo del sistema di test e le attività di pre-serie. Contribuisci alla conformità con gli standard pertinenti durante il ciclo di vita dello sviluppo hardware. Il tuo profilo Master in Ingegneria Elettronica. Esperienza comprovata, almeno 2 anni, nella progettazione analogica, di potenza e di elettronica digitale; conoscenza di VHDL e strumenti di simulazione elettronica. Familiarità con apparecchiature di misura (multimetri, oscilloscopi) e linguaggi di programmazione (C, C++, C#, ). Conoscenza di Matlab/Simulink; FMEA e processi di qualità sono un plus. Approccio metodico e rigoroso, forte orientamento del team, e genuina spinta per il miglioramento continuo. Fluente in italiano; tecnico inglese (ordinario e scritto) è richiesto. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventore di EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), è noto come marchio premium e leader dell'innovazione in filo, die-sinking, e foro-drilling EDM. Le sue soluzioni di automazione sono utilizzate nella fabbricazione di stampi e nella produzione di componenti di fascia alta, offrendo precisione, affidabilità e prestazioni svizzere. Grandi opportunità di carriera: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità per quanto riguarda la crescita della carriera. Offriamo anche un dedicato processo di gestione del talento (MyNextBigStep) per aumentare la vostra carriera. Strumenti di apprendimento eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING forniamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo globale strumenti di apprendimento, nonché formazione e corsi specializzati. Sostenibilità e innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Lavoriamo verso un futuro sostenibile insieme. UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per componenti e strumenti di precisione produttori e l'industria dello stampaggio. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, EDM, texturing laser, micromachining laser, e macchine di produzione additive. Inoltre, la divisione offre mandrini, automazione, utensili e digitalizzazione soluzioni supportate da servizi e supporto clienti senza rivali. UNITED MACHINING comprende i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING ha sede a Biel, in Svizzera, e attualmente conta oltre 3'000 dipendenti su oltre 50 siti in tutto il mondo. descriptionByLocale.en: Electronic Engineer - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Electronic Engineer - R&D AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, 6616 Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 100% 6616 Losone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Electronic Engineer - R&D Electronic Engineer – R&D Workload: 100% Location: Losone Job type: Unlimited Your tasks Design, develop, test, and maintain power, analog, and digital electronics for current and next-generation generator hardware platforms for EDM (electro discharge) machines. Acquire and develop process control know-how on EDM machines, including troubleshooting and process analysis, contributing to customer/field case resolution and working closely with application development teams. Support component homologation, database management, and purchasing activities for new and second-source components. Collaborate with Production teams on test system development and pre-series activities. Contribute to compliance with relevant standards throughout the hardware development lifecycle. Your profile Master's degree in Electronic Engineering. Proven experience, at least 2 years, in analog, power, and digital electronics design; knowledge of VHDL and electronic simulation tools. Familiarity with measurement equipment (multimeters, oscilloscopes) and programming languages (C, C++, C#, ). Knowledge of Matlab/Simulink; FMEA and quality processes are a plus. Methodical and rigorous approach, strong team orientation, and genuine drive for continuous improvement. Fluent in Italian; technical English (oral and written) is required. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance. Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career. Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future together. UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites worldwide.                                     Software PLC Engineer - R&D
Software PLC Engineer – R&D
Workload: 100%
Location: Losone
Job type: Unlimited
Your tasks
Participate in the analysis of project needs and contribute to the definition of software requirements, including 
inputs from Market, Production, and R&D.
Collaborate with HMI, process control, mechanical, and electrical teams to define specifications for complex PLC and 
real-time software components.
Develop, test, and optimize PLC and real-time software applications to meet functional and performance requirements.
Maintain and update technical documentation and software specifications throughout the development lifecycle.
Support fast prototyping activities and contribute to sprint planning in collaboration with the Software Component 
Owners.
Your profile
Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Automation Engineering, Computer Engineering, or Electronic Engineering.
At least 1 year of experience in PLC and/or real-time software development (e.g., C, C++, Structured Text).
Experience with simulation and modeling tools (e.g., Matlab/Simulink).
Basic knowledge of analog and digital electronics.
Experience in the machine tools industry and ISO programming is a plus.
Fluent in Italian. English level B2 or higher.
AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.
Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.
Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.
Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.
UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites 
worldwide.

+41 91 806 90 30

Agie Charmilles SA, Losone

6616 Losone

descriptionByLocale.fr: Ingénieur logiciel PLC - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Bienne (TI). ## Ingénieur du logiciel PLC - R-D AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, 6616 Losone Aucune Angestellte (Schweiz) Aucune Angestellte (mondiale) Temporaneo: Numéro Carico di lavoro: 100 % 6616 Losone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Page d'accueil Ingénieur du logiciel PLC - R-D Ingénieur du logiciel PLC – R-D Charge de travail: 100% Lieu: Losone Type d'emploi: Illimité Vos tâches Participer à l'analyse des besoins du projet et contribuer à la définition des besoins en logiciels, y compris les intrants provenant du marché, de la production et de la R-D. Collaborer avec les équipes HMI, contrôle des processus, mécanique et électrique pour définir les spécifications pour les PLC complexes et composants logiciels en temps réel. Développer, tester et optimiser les applications logicielles en temps réel et PLC pour répondre aux exigences fonctionnelles et de performance. Maintenir et mettre à jour la documentation technique et les spécifications du logiciel tout au long du cycle de développement. Soutenir des activités de prototypage rapides et contribuer à la planification du sprint en collaboration avec le composant logiciel Propriétaires. Votre profil Baccalauréat ou maîtrise en ingénierie d'automatisation, en génie informatique ou en génie électronique. Au moins 1 an d'expérience en PLC et/ou en développement de logiciels en temps réel (p. ex. C, C++, Texte structuré). Expérience des outils de simulation et de modélisation (p. ex. Matlab/Simulink). Connaissance de base de l'électronique analogique et numérique. L'expérience dans l'industrie des machines-outils et la programmation ISO est un atout. Fluent en italien. Niveau d'anglais B2 ou plus. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventeur d'EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), est connu comme une marque haut de gamme et leader de l'innovation dans le fil, l'enroulement et l'EDM perçant les trous. Ses solutions d'automatisation sont utilisées dans la fabrication de moules et la production de composants haut de gamme, offrant une précision, une fiabilité et des performances suisses. Grandes opportunités de carrière: UNITED MACHINING offre de nombreuses opportunités concernant la croissance de carrière. Nous offrons également une processus de gestion des talents dédié (MyNextBigStep) pour stimuler votre carrière. Excellents outils d'apprentissage : Chez UNITED MACHINING, nous offrons des possibilités de développement à tous. Nous offrons mondial des outils d'apprentissage ainsi que des formations et des cours spécialisés. Priorité à la durabilité et à l'innovation : Nous avons des objectifs de durabilité et d'innovation élevés. Travaillons vers une un avenir durable ensemble. UNITED MACHINING est l'un des principaux fournisseurs mondiaux de solutions complètes pour les composants et outils de précision les fabricants et l'industrie de la fabrication de moules. Le portefeuille comprend fraisage, EDM, texture laser, microusinage laser, et machines de fabrication additive. De plus, la division offre des broches, l'automatisation, l'outillage et la numérisation des solutions soutenues par des services et un support clients inégalés. MACHINING UNITED comprend les marques AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC et SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING a son siège social à Biel, en Suisse, et compte actuellement plus de 3'000 employés sur plus de 50 sites mondial. Technical supplier quality
Technical supplier quality
Pensum: 80-100 %
Place of work: Biel
Type of employment: Unlimited
Your tasks
Monitoring all quality-relevant processes in assembly and non-conformity management and processing of
Complaints to suppliers
Implementation of audits and promotion of quality development at suppliers
Implementation of all potential CAR measures (Corrective Action Request) arising from market and
Production requirements
Incoming goods, batch testing and release of first samples
Development and monitoring of quality processes according to ISO standards and international regulations
Project-related measurement tasks for component development
Collection and analysis of performance indicators and reporting
Your profile
Basic technical education (machine engineering, electrical engineering or similar) with further education in quality management
Knowledge of quality assurance and experience in the application of methods such as PPAP, 8D, Ishikawa etc.
Very good knowledge of MS-Office; Experience with SAP
High analytical skills, initiative, reliability and sense of responsibility
Very good knowledge of German and English, English or Italian
MIKRON MILL is one of the world's experts for vertical milling and high-speed milling. The
automatable machines are known for dynamic precision and free-form accuracy and deliver
Top performance in complex applications. MIKRON MILL stands for innovation, agility and sustainable added value.
Learn more...
We offer
Excellent career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING offers many opportunities for career development. We offer
Talent Management Process (MyNextBigStep) to promote your career.
Excellent training tools: At UNITED MACHINING we offer development opportunities for all. We offer
Global learning tools as well as training and specialized courses.
Focus on sustainability and innovation: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let us
work together on a sustainable future.
About United Machining
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading suppliers of complete solutions for manufacturers of
Precision components and tools as well as for mold construction. The portfolio includes machines for milling,
spark erosion, laser structuring, laser micromachining and additive manufacturing. In addition,
Spindles, automation solutions, tools and digitized solutions, through
support unmatched customer service and support.
UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently employs more than 3,000 employees
50 locations worldwide.

                                    Software PLC Engineer \- R\&D Software PLC Engineer – R\&D Workload: 100% Location: Losone Job type: Unlimited Your 
tasks Participate in the analysis of project needs and contribute to the definition of software requirements, including 
inputs from Market, Production, and R\&D. Collaborate with HMI, process control, mechanical, and electrical teams to 
define specifications for complex PLC and real\-time software components. Develop, test, and optimize PLC and 
real\-time software applications to meet functional and performance requirements. Maintain and update technical 
documentation and software specifications throughout the development lifecycle. Support fast prototyping activities and 
contribute to sprint planning in collaboration with the Software Component Owners. Your profile Bachelor's or Master’s 
degree in Automation Engineering, Computer Engineering, or Electronic Engineering. At least 1 year of experience in PLC 
and/or real\-time software development (e.g., C, C\+\+, Structured Text). Experience with simulation and modeling tools 
(e.g., Matlab/Simulink). Basic knowledge of analog and digital electronics. Experience in the machine tools industry 
and ISO programming is a plus. Fluent in Italian. English level B2 or higher. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM 
(Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader in wire, die\-sinking, and 
hole\-drilling EDM. Its automation\-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production of high\-end components, 
offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance. Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many 
opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost 
your career. Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer 
global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high 
sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future together. UNITED MACHINING is one of the 
world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold\-making 
industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing 
machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by 
unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, 
, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 
employees on over 50 sites worldwide. Your contact Mollar HR Business Partner \+41 91 806 90 30 Web E\-Mail Agie 
Charmilles SA, Losone Via Zandone 1 6616 Losone Schweiz Apply now jidc8eb345jm jit0519jm jiy26jm

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

descriptionByLocale.it: Software PLC Engineer - R&D 100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Software PLC Engineer - R&D 100% AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-6616 Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) Nessuno Angestellte (globale) Temporaneo: No. Carico di lavoro: 100% CH-6616 Losone Lingua: Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Software PLC Engineer \- R\&D Software PLC Engineer – R\&D Workload: 100% Location: Losone Tipo di lavoro: Unlimited Your Partecipare all'analisi delle esigenze del progetto e contribuire alla definizione dei requisiti software, incluso ingressi da Market, Production e R\&D. Collabora con HMI, controllo del processo, team meccanici ed elettrici definire le specifiche per i componenti del software PLC complessi e real\-time. Sviluppare, testare e ottimizzare PLC e applicazioni software in tempo reale per soddisfare i requisiti funzionali e di prestazioni. Mantenere e aggiornare tecnico documentazione e specifiche software in tutto il ciclo di vita di sviluppo. Supportare attività di prototipazione veloci e contribuire alla pianificazione sprint in collaborazione con i proprietari di componenti software. including troubleshooting and process analysis, contributing to customer/field case resolution and working closely with 
application development teams. Support component homologation, database management, and purchasing activities for new 
and second\-source components. Collaborate with Production teams on test system development and pre\-series activities. 
Contribute to compliance with relevant standards throughout the hardware development lifecycle. Your profile Master's 
degree in Electronic Engineering. Proven experience, at least 2 years, in analog, power, and digital electronics 
design; knowledge of VHDL and electronic simulation tools. Familiarity with measurement equipment (multimeters, 
oscilloscopes) and programming languages (C, C\+\+, C\#, ). Knowledge of Matlab/Simulink; FMEA and quality processes 
are a plus. Methodical and rigorous approach, strong team orientation, and genuine drive for continuous improvement. 
Fluent in Italian; technical English (oral and written) is required. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical 
Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader in wire, die\-sinking, and hole\-drilling EDM.

machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by 
unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, 
, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000

descriptionByLocale.fr: Ingénieur électronique - R&D 100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Bienne (TI). ## Ingénieur électronique - R-D 100% AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-6616 Losone Aucune Angestellte (Schweiz) Aucune Angestellte (mondiale) Temporaneo: Numéro Carico di lavoro: 100 % CH-6616 Losone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Page d'accueil Ingénieur électronique \- R\&D Ingénieur électronique – R\&D Charge de travail: 100% Lieu: Losone Type d'emploi: illimité Vos tâches Concevoir, développer, tester et maintenir la puissance, l'analogique et l'électronique numérique pour le générateur actuel et la prochaine génération plates-formes matérielles pour machines EDM (décharge électronique). Acquérir et développer un savoir-faire en matière de contrôle des processus sur les machines EDM, y compris le dépannage et l'analyse des processus, contribuant à la résolution de cas client/sur le terrain et travaillant en étroite collaboration avec des équipes de développement des applications. Composante d'appui : homologation, gestion de bases de données et activités d'achat et les composants de la deuxième source. Collaborer avec les équipes de production à l'élaboration de systèmes d'essai et aux activités de pré-série. Contribuer à la conformité aux normes pertinentes tout au long du cycle de développement du matériel. Votre profil Master Diplôme en génie électronique. Expérience éprouvée, au moins 2 ans, en électronique analogique, électrique et numérique conception; connaissance de la VHDL et des outils de simulation électronique. Familiarité avec l'équipement de mesure (multimètres, oscilloscopes) et langages de programmation (C, C\+\+, C\#, ). Connaissance de Matlab/Simulink; FMEA et processus de qualité sont un plus. Approche méthodique et rigoureuse, forte orientation de l'équipe et véritable effort d'amélioration continue. Fluent en italien; l'anglais technique (oral et écrit) est requis. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventeur d'EDM (Electrical Décharge d'usinage), est connu comme une marque premium et leader de l'innovation dans le fil, l'enroulement et le forage de trou. Ses solutions d'automatisation sont utilisées dans la fabrication de moules et la production de composants haut de gamme, offrant précision, fiabilité et performance. Grandes opportunités de carrière: UNITED MACHINING offre de nombreuses opportunités concernant la croissance de carrière. Nous offrons également un processus de gestion des talents dédié (MyNextBigStep) pour stimuler votre carrière. Excellents outils d'apprentissage : Chez UNITED MACHINING, nous offrons des possibilités de développement à tous. Nous offrons mondial des outils d'apprentissage ainsi que des formations et des cours spécialisés. La durabilité et l'innovation: nous avons une forte les objectifs de durabilité et d'innovation. Travaillons ensemble vers un avenir durable. UNITED MACHINING est l'un des les principaux fournisseurs mondiaux de solutions complètes pour les fabricants de composants et d'outils de précision et la fabrication de moules l'industrie. La gamme comprend le fraisage, l'EDM, la texturation laser, le microusinage laser et la fabrication additive les machines. En outre, la division propose des broches, l'automatisation, l'outillage et des solutions numérisées soutenues par services à la clientèle inégalés et soutien. MACHINING UNITED comprend les marques AGIE CHARMILES, CHARMILES, MIKRON MILL, , ÉTAPE TEC et SYSTÈME 3R. UNITED MACHINING est basée à Biel, en Suisse, et compte actuellement plus de 3'000 employés sur plus de 50 sites dans le monde. Votre contact Mollar HR Business Partner \+41 91 806 90 30 Web E\-Mail Agie Charmilles SA, Losone Via Zandone 1 6616 Losone Schweiz Postuler maintenant jidccf79f3jm jit0519jm jiy26jm Indietro

Le portefeuille comprend des machines pour le fraisage, l'électroérosion, la structuration laser, le micro-usinage laser et la fabrication additive. De plus, la division propose des broches, des solutions d'automatisation, des outils et des solutions numérisées soutenues par un service client et une assistance inégalés. UNITED MACHINING regroupe les marques AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC et SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHING a son siège à Bienne, en Suisse, et emploie actuellement plus de 3 000 personnes sur plus de 50 sites dans le monde. Pour en savoir plus... Votre contact Imsand Talent Acquisition Manager \+41 32 366 11 11 Web E\-Mail United Machining Mill AG \- Kanalweg 4 3550 Langnau i. E. Suisse Postulez maintenant jid97cf566jm jit0418jm jiy26jm

MIKRON MILL è uno degli esperti mondiali di fresatura verticale e fresatura ad alta velocità. Le macchine di automazione-capable sono note per la precisione dinamica e la precisione della forma libera e offrono l'eccellenza in applicazioni complesse.
